case.title: Ambiguity-Aware Identity Search and Motif Rescue
case.workflow: Treat an ambiguity-bearing consensus record as a real query and verify that identity search and motif logic still recover the correct biological family.

records.name: EGFP_CDS
records.origin: Engineered fluorescent reporter derived from the Aequorea victoria GFP family.
records.why_it_matters: EGFP is a canonical lab reporter: great for teaching translation, cloning, sequence verification, and how a few codons can change an optical phenotype.

records.name: EGFP_ambiguity_consensus_training
records.origin: Training derivative of EGFP that uses IUPAC ambiguity symbols to mimic a consensus sequence assembled from uncertain or mixed evidence.
records.why_it_matters: It teaches that uncertainty can be represented explicitly instead of being hidden behind a forced single-base call.
records.source_label: Derived from EGFP_CDS for ambiguity-aware assay and search training

records.name: mCherry_CDS
records.origin: Monomeric red fluorescent protein from the mFruit engineering lineage.
records.why_it_matters: mCherry is a real-world counterexample to GFP: same broad job as a reporter, different sequence history, color, and engineering constraints.
records.source_label: PubMed: A monomeric red fluorescent protein
